headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 4 critical, 17 high, 10 medium, 8 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) and Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI); plus 18 other bases. 10 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Craiova (CRA/LRCV) and Vilnius (VNO/EYVI). Network hotspots: Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Seve Ballesteros-Santander (SDR/LEXJ), Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) and 22 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, mist and cold‑temperature performance penalties. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Seve Ballesteros-Santander (SDR/LEXJ) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 0 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — HIGH: mist; visibility down to 1.5 km, cloud base around 200 ft | Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI) — HIGH: thunderstorm / convective risk | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Rome–Fiumicino Leonardo da Vinci (FCO/LIRF) — HIGH: fog; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 0 ft | Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; runway contamination risk and 15 others. Worst affected now: Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; strong gusts risk (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) | Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Seve Ballesteros-Santander (SDR/LEXJ) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 0 ft (drivers: operational constraints) | Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; visibility down to 1.5 km (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) | Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: fog; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 700 m, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: runway visual range (RVR) constraints, very low visibility, low ceilings) | Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH) — CRIT: mist; snow; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: approach minima limits, low ceilings, mist) and 21 others. Changed since last run: Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Seve Ballesteros-Santander (SDR/LEXJ), Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Solidarity Szczecin–Goleniów (SZZ/EPSC), Stockholm-Arlanda (ARN/ESSA), Kaunas (KUN/EYKA) and 2 others.
